title: rubus subarcticus
intro: Rubus subarcticus, also known as Arctic raspberry, is a species of bramble or thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus subarcticus include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, such as digestive issues and skin conditions.
